purpose: FundingPips 2-Step FLEX $10,000 REAL challenge (account 20414926 @ FundingPips-SIM1). 10K-viable book: XAU(micro) + ETH + DJI30. The 100K book (XAU+BTC+NDX, configs/v5_ftmo_challenge.json) cannot be sized here — on FundingPips specs BTC ($642) and NDX100 ($5,746) min-lots round target lots to ZERO.
_model_note: FundingPips 2-Step Flex (verified 2026-07-20): P1 +10% / P2 +6%; max DAILY loss 4%; max overall loss 12% STATIC; NO time limit; NO consistency rule; inactivity 30 days; min trading days per reward split (85% = none, 95% = 3 profitable days >=0.5%). Weekend AND overnight holding ALLOWED during Evaluation. Purposely trading news is PROHIBITED in Evaluation (holding through news is fine). Master/funded: weekend holding NOT allowed since 29-Jan-2026 (auto-closed Friday) -> re-plan before funded stage.
_book_note: XAU(micro) + ETH + DJI30, equal 1/3, long-only champion recipe + portfolio vol-target. Flex sim @7% vol: eval SR 1.41 (2021+ 0.95), pass 98.8%, fail-daily 0.0%, fail-DD 1.2%, median 16.6mo, maxDD -9.7%. Three uncorrelated factors (XAU/ETH 0.09, XAU/DJI 0.07, ETH/DJI 0.16). Rejected: +BTC (84.4%, 14.6% daily fails - too volatile), STX50/FTSE100 instead of DJI30 (94.3%/93.7%, weaker sleeves SR 0.30/0.06), XAU+ETH only (96.4% but slower 22.7mo).
_sizing_note: VERIFIED at $10,000 on real FundingPips specs: XAUUSDmicro tgt $341 -> 0.01 lot ($402, 1.18x), ETHUSD tgt $247 -> 0.13 lot ($242, 0.98x), DJI30 tgt $2,949 -> 0.01 lot ($2,614, 0.89x). Gross 0.92x target => realized vol ~6.4% vs 7% (conservative, safer vs the 4% daily line). Min-lot notionals: ETHUSD $18.63, XAUUSDmicro $402, DJI30 $2,614. DO NOT substitute XAUUSD (min-lot $4,020) or NDX100 ($5,746) - they round to zero/oversize at 10K.

symbols._note: engine symbol -> FundingPips broker name. VERIFIED live on account 20414926 (FundingPips-SIM1) 2026-07-20: all trade_mode=4 FULL.

guards._note: FLEX is TIGHTER than Standard: daily limit 4% -> flatten at 3.0% (1.0% margin); max loss 12% -> halt at 10% (2% margin); targets +10% (P1) / +6% (P2).

_min_days_note: 85% reward split = no minimum; 95% split = 3 profitable days each >=0.5%. Set to 3 to be safe; report tracks it.

news_filter._note: Evaluation prohibits PURPOSELY trading news. Bot never opens inside a red-folder window. close_in_profit=false: holding through news is explicitly allowed, so don't churn out of good positions.
